overall.description: First-person exploration through a sunlit industrial district in Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks along empty streets past concrete walls and industrial mega-structures, navigating through an intersection with storage tanks before entering a covered parking structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with concrete retaining wall and overhead pipes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a high concrete retaining wall, approaching an industrial intersection

entered.detail: tall gray concrete wall running along the left side of the sidewalk
network of large industrial pipes and gantries spanning across the street
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street
massive industrial complex with geometric facade patterns and steam vents
large vertical billboard with 'MOTORS' text mounted on the retaining wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along an empty industrial street. A tall concrete retaining wall runs along the left side featuring a large motors billboard, while palm trees and massive industrial buildings with steam vents dominate the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial intersection with large storage tanks

events.description: turning right at the intersection to navigate around the industrial complex
entering the industrial area with large white storage tanks and smokestacks

agents.ego_description: navigating the intersection by turning right, then left into an industrial zone with large storage tanks and security barriers

notable_agents.action: red car driving along the industrial road in the distance

entered.detail: large white cylindrical storage tanks with blue stripes
tall industrial chimneys emitting white smoke
red and white striped concrete barriers blocking off areas
small brown security booth with yellow door

segments.scene_description: The player turns right at the intersection, revealing an open industrial area with massive white storage tanks, smokestacks, and security barriers. After briefly entering this zone, the view shifts left back toward the main street, passing a small guard shack and red vehicle.

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk toward a covered parking entrance, passing under overhead walkways

entered.detail: tall smooth concrete wall with vertical ridges along the sidewalk
elevated pedestrian or utility bridge spanning the street
large dark entrance to a covered parking or industrial structure

segments.scene_description: Returning to the street level, the player walks along a concrete sound barrier wall toward a covered parking structure in the distance. Overhead walkways and industrial pipes frame the path as the environment remains devoid of pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered parking garage entrance with parked vehicles

events.description: entering the covered parking structure from the bright outdoor street
transition from bright natural sunlight to dimmer interior lighting with fluorescent tubes

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered parking structure where the lighting dims significantly, navigating between parked cars

entered.detail: large covered industrial parking area with high ceiling and exposed beams
thick concrete pillars supporting the overhead structure
several parked vehicles including a dark sedan and green car
long fluorescent light tubes illuminating the interior

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered parking structure, transitioning from bright sunlight to a dimly lit interior with fluorescent lighting. Concrete support pillars line the left side while parked cars sit on the right, and the path continues deeper into the industrial complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sunlit industrial district that eventually transitions into a dimly lit parking structure. It begins by walking along an empty street beside a tall concrete retaining wall and a motors billboard, with steam vents and massive buildings looming in the distance. As the camera turns right at an intersection, the view opens into an industrial zone filled with white storage tanks and smokestacks before shifting back toward the main road past a guard shack and a red vehicle. The path then continues along a concrete sound barrier under a network of overhead walkways and pipes, moving steadily toward a distant covered entrance. Finally, the camera enters the parking structure, where the bright daylight gives way to a shadowed interior defined by fluorescent lighting, concrete pillars, and rows of parked cars.
